projects.name: InternTracker — Job Application Tracker
projects.summary: Full-stack SaaS application for tracking job applications with drag-and-drop Kanban board, authentication, and automated email reminders. Deployed to AWS EC2 and live at interntracker.io. Achieved 500+ registered users within 2 weeks of launch and won $5,000 prize at HackUCLA 2024.

projects.name: PricePulse — E-Commerce Price Monitor
projects.summary: Automated price monitoring system using Python web scraper deployed as AWS Lambda cron job. Monitors 3,000+ product listings daily, handles 10,000+ requests per day, and sends email alerts for price drops exceeding 15%. Redis caching layer optimizes performance by reducing repeat API calls.
